description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a single job named test using the debian:stretch Docker image. In the default test stage, the job executes the following shell commands in order: apt update -y, apt dist-upgrade -y, apt install -y --no-install-recommends python3-pip python3-setuptools flake8, pip3 install -e ., and tests/run-tests. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
